name: Kaushik Parthasarathy
title: Software Engineer | AI/ML Systems | Distributed & Full-Stack
bio: I build reliable software systems, from architecture and algorithms to production deployment. My work spans full-stack platforms, AI/ML pipelines, and large-scale production systems, with a focus on designing modular architectures that remain maintainable as systems grow in scale and complexity. I care about clear abstractions, thoughtful tradeoffs between performance and flexibility, and building systems that are easy to extend and operate in real-world environments. Previously, I worked on fintech systems at Wells Fargo supporting portfolio applications managing $400B+ in assets, and on computer vision research systems developed in collaboration with ISRO and NIT Trichy. I’m currently pursuing an MS in Computer Science at UMass Amherst, focusing on AI/ML systems and scalable software engineering.
workAuthorization: F-1 · CPT authorized · Will require STEM OPT / H-1B sponsorship
principles: Scalable systems should be boring in production
Deployment is part of the feature
Good architecture makes the next change easier
